properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The move is on, my Lord, The move is on; The move is on, my Lord, The move is on. I can hear the rustle In the mulberry trees, And I know, I know, I know The move is on.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Move on brother, Move on sister, This is the moving day, Move a little closer, Where the streams are flowing; Move on, brother, move on.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I saw the light, I saw the light No more darkness, no more night Now I'm so happy, no sorrow inside Praise the Lord, I saw the light

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I like the old time singing, shouting, I like the old time way. I like the old time singing, shouting, Preaching, praying, I like the old time way.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I sing about my Saviour everywhere I go, Everywhere I go, everywhere I go; I sing about my Saviour everywhere I go For there's joy, joy in my soul.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's bubbling, It's bubbling, It's bubbling in my soul. There's singing, and shouting, Since Jesus made me whole. Some folks don't understand me, And I can't help but sing It's bubbling, bubbling, bubbling, bubbling, Bubbling in my soul.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm going home, On the road home. Going back to God where I belong. Heaven and earth will embrace, Glory to God! I'll see His face! I'm going back to God Where I belong.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus, hold my hand, I need Thee every hour; While through this pilgrim land, protect me by Thy power. Hear my feeble plea, Oh, Lord, look down on me, When I kneel in prayer, I know I’ll meet You there, Blessed Jesus, hold my hand.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh, what singing Oh, what shouting, On that happy morning when we all shall rise; Oh, what glory, hallelujah, When we meet our blessed Savior in the skies.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We're all going up, We're all going up We're all going up in the first resurrection. We're all going up, We're all going up We're all going up, Oh, praise the Lord.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: There'll be coming from the East, There'll be coming from the West, There'll be coming from the North, There'll be coming from the South. We're all going up, We're all going up We're all going up, Oh, praise the Lord.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: I'll fly away, oh glory, I'll fly away; when i'm gone Hallelujah by and by, I'll fly away.
